rulings.Case Title: SF OAKLAND BAY, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. PORTSIDE MASTER OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, A NONPROFIT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANTS JOHN CORNWELL AND DAVID HARTZELL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 26, 2023 line 1. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANTS JOHN CORNWELL AND DAVID HARTZELL is transferred to department 302 to be heard on October 13, 2023 per the order of the presiding judge. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: FRANK LUCCHETTI VS. NKECHI EMERUWA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Frank Lucchetti'S Notice Of Request For Sanctions And Request For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Sec 437c(J)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 26, 2023 line 7. PLAINTIFF FRANK LUCCHETTI Plaintiff Frank Lucchetti'S Notice Of Request For Sanctions And Request For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Sec 437c(J) is DENIED. Even if the court were to find that the declaration of Kristen Drake was filed in bad faith/with intent to cause delay, the moving party failed to specify the amount of fees caused to be incurred due to the filing of the declaration of Kristen Drake, which is the subject of this motion or that all the fees associated with the opposition to the motion for summary judgment were incurred due to the filing of the declaration of Kristen Drake. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests.
